title: force-app knowledge extraction tuning
description: Extractor tuning for scripts/force_app_knowledge.py (usage-reference caps and Apex source-token heuristics). Governance stays in config/knowledge-policy.json; this file only tunes what the collector reads out of source. The file is optional - absent config falls back to the collector's built-in defaults.

maxUsageRefs.description: Upper bound on emitted usage references per component (permission sets and layouts can enumerate hundreds of grants); totals are always recorded in facts even when references are capped.

additionalSystemTypes.description: Extra platform/utility type names excluded from the invokes-class heuristic, on top of the built-in list.

soqlFieldExtraction.description: Extract SELECT/WHERE field identifiers (including standard fields) from inline SOQL blocks as soql-field references.

localVariableResolution.description: Resolve locally declared sObject variables (Type var; ... var.Field) to var-field-ref references.

errorSurfaceExtraction.description: Extract declared error surfaces into facts.errorCatalog: Flow custom errors, screen validation messages, and fault paths (with the decision paths guarding them), plus validation-rule error message text.
